title: Advanced Modeling Capstone and Reproducible Research · Cumulative Modeling Board
summary: Cumulative unfamiliar continuous, discrete, stochastic, numerical, and optimization cases requiring derivation, implementation, validation, and professional defense. Planned artifact: Produce a cumulative evidence packet across unfamiliar cases, performance tasks, explanations, and root-cause repairs. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate identifiability in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Communicate model governance in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Validate multivariable functions in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.

steps.title: Solve the performance case
steps.instruction: A measured quantity starts at 22 units, changes by −9 units, then by +8 units. Calculate the final quantity.

A defensible solution applies Reproducible Release, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a reproducible capstone reproducibility computational study.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: reproducible release can be applied from a memorized formula without checking assumptions, conditioning, or validation. This fails the Reproducible Release contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: NumPy Documentation (NumPy 2.5) — Controls array, linear algebra, random, Fourier, and numerical implementation practice.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Communicate reproducible release in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.

hints: Name the Reproducible Release precondition or invariant that the exam case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed exam case derived from this module: math advanced capstone reproducibility. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: reproducible release can be applied from a memorized formula without checking assumptions, conditioning, or validation.

stimulus.title: Reproducible Release failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: reproducible release can be applied from a memorized formula without checking assumptions, conditioning, or validation.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Communicate reproducible release in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.

options.text: Ignore the boundary result because the primary demonstration passed.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Stop release, localize the cause, repair the smallest responsible layer, and rerun the full changed-case set.

steps.title: Submit the certification defense
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Reproducible Release applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Communicate reproducible release in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.

hints: Name the Reproducible Release precondition or invariant that the exam case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed exam case derived from this module: math advanced capstone reproducibility. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: reproducible release can be applied from a memorized formula without checking assumptions, conditioning, or validation.

checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.
